title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: January 11, 2024
summary: January 11, 2024: The sea ice has continued to increase , but at a lesser rate of 3.38% (from last week’s growth rate of 3.93%), from the level on 01/04/2024 of 13.449 M km 2 to 13.920 M km 2 for this week.
